productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Casual Brown Sandals
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of franco leone leather slippers. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair of slippers and leave behind your style statement wherever you go.UpperWide leather midfoot strap with a stylish metallic clip on the lateral side for absolute comfort and styleErgonomically padded leather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole textured with leaf skeleton grooves on the forefoot and heel, with suction points on the front forefoot and back heel for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
